AddMemberToTag.displayName: Add a member to a team tag
AddMemberToTag.description: Adds a user to a team tag

AddMemberToTeam.displayName: Add a member to a team
AddMemberToTeam.description: Adds a member to a team in Microsoft Teams

AtMentionTag.displayName: Get an @mention token for a team tag
AtMentionTag.description: Creates a token that can be inserted into a message or adaptive card sent as a user in a channel to @mention a team tag.

AtMentionUser.displayName: Get an @mention token for a user
AtMentionUser.description: Creates a token that can be inserted into a message or adaptive card to @mention a user.

CreateATeam.description: Creates a new team in Microsoft Teams

CreateChannel.description: Create a new channel within a specified team

CreateChat.description: Creates a one on one or group chat

CreateTag.displayName: Create a tag for a team
CreateTag.description: Creates a tag in a team

CreateTeamsMeeting.description: Create a meeting with a link at the bottom of the invite to join the meeting online on Microsoft Teams.

DeleteTag.description: Deletes a tag from a team

DeleteTagMember.displayName: Delete a member from a team tag
DeleteTagMember.description: Deletes a member from a team tag

GetAllAssociatedTeams.description: Lists all the teams you are a direct member of, or are a member of a shared channel that is hosted inside the team.

GetAllChannelsForTeam.description: Lists all the channels for a specific team, including channels that are shared with the team

GetAllTeams.description: Lists all the teams in Microsoft Teams that you are a member of

GetChannel.displayName: Get details for a specific channel in a team

GetChannelsForGroup.description: Lists all the channels for a specific team

GetChats.description: Lists recent chats you are a part of

GetMessageDetails.description: Gets the details of a message in a chat or a channel.

GetMessagesFromChannel.description: Gets messages from a channel in a specific team. For shared channels, the team ID must refer to the host team, which is the team that owns the shared channel.

GetTagMembers.displayName: List the members of a team tag
GetTagMembers.description: Lists the members of a team tag

GetTags.displayName: List all tags for a team

GetTeam.description: Gets the details for a team in Microsoft Teams.

HttpRequest.displayName: Send a Microsoft Graph HTTP request
HttpRequest.description: Construct a Microsoft Graph REST API request to invoke against the Microsoft Teams endpoints. These segments are supported: 1st segment: /teams, /me, /users 2nd segment: channels, chats, installedApps, messages, pinnedMessages. Learn more: https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/use-the-api

ListMembers.description: List direct members of a group chat or a channel

ListRepliesToMessage.displayName: List replies of a channel message
ListRepliesToMessage.description: List replies to a message in a channel in a specific team. For shared channels, the team ID must refer to the host team, which is the team that owns the shared channel.

OnGroupMembershipAdd.displayName: When a new team member is added
OnGroupMembershipAdd.description: Triggers when a member is added to the given team

OnGroupMembershipRemoval.displayName: When a new team member is removed
OnGroupMembershipRemoval.description: Triggers when a member is removed from the specified team

OnNewChannelMessage.displayName: When a new channel message is added
OnNewChannelMessage.description: Triggers when a new message is posted to a channel in a team. Note that this trigger only fires when a root messages is added in the channel. Replies to an existing channel message will not result in the trigger event firing. For shared channels, the team ID must refer to the host team, which is the team that owns the shared channel.

OnNewChannelMessageMentioningMe.displayName: When I am mentioned in a channel message
OnNewChannelMessageMentioningMe.description: Triggers when a new message that @mentions the current user is added to a channel in a team. For shared channels, the team ID must refer to the host team, which is the team that owns the shared channel.

PostCardToConversation.displayName: Post card in a chat or channel
PostCardToConversation.description: Posts a card to a chat or a channel

PostFeedNotification.description: Posts a notification to a user's activity feed linking to a chat or team.

PostMessageToConversation.displayName: Post message in a chat or channel
PostMessageToConversation.description: Posts a message to a chat or a channel

ReplyWithCardToConversation.displayName: Reply with an adaptive card in a channel
ReplyWithCardToConversation.description: Replies with an adaptive card to a channel's message

ReplyWithMessageToConversation.displayName: Reply with a message in a channel
ReplyWithMessageToConversation.description: Replies with a message to a channel's message

UpdateCardInConversation.displayName: Update an adaptive card in a chat or channel

PostCardAndWaitForResponse.displayName: Post adaptive card and wait for a response
PostCardAndWaitForResponse.description: Posts an adaptive card to a chat or a channel and waits for a response from any user. This will pause the flow until any user responds.

SubscribeUserMessageWithOptions.displayName: Post a choice of options as the Flow bot to a user
SubscribeUserMessageWithOptions.description: Send a set of options to a Microsoft Teams user, that they must respond to before the flow will continue. This action will pause the flow until the user response to the options

WebhookAtMentionTrigger.description: Triggers when a new message that @mentions the current user is added to a specified chat or channel.

WebhookChatMessageTrigger.displayName: When a new chat message is added
WebhookChatMessageTrigger.description: Triggers when a new message is posted in any chat the user is a part of.

WebhookKeywordTrigger.description: Triggers when a keyword is mentioned in a specified chat or channel. Does not trigger if a message is edited.

WebhookMessageReactionTrigger.displayName: When someone reacted to a message in chat
WebhookMessageReactionTrigger.description: Triggers when someone reacts to a message in a specified chat or channel.

WebhookNewMessageTrigger.displayName: When a new message is added to a chat or channel
WebhookNewMessageTrigger.description: Triggers when a new message is posted in a specified chat or channel. Does not trigger if a message is edited.
